If you get the chance, you should visit: If you get the chance, you should visit Chrisola Hotel's arcade.
You can pick up an \"AP\" membership car: You can pick up an "AP" membership card there and check all the AP you've collected.
Additionally, you can pick up items in e: Additionally, you can pick up items in exchange for AP.
And I'm talkin' cool stuff, dude! Like a: And I'm talkin' cool stuff, dude! Like an EXP-ALL, or EV Cards for the Gearen Laboratory!
Shiny Pokémon have different colors than: Shiny Pokémon have different colors than they do in other regions.
I wonder what causes that? Could it be s: I wonder what causes that? Could it be something in the air?
Help Centers are all around the region!: Help Centers are all around the region! People put their troubles there for people to go and solve.
I recommend you do some of them if you c: I recommend you do some of them if you can. You get rewarded handsomely!
West Gearen is home to Gearen HQ. That's: West Gearen is home to Gearen HQ. That's where the region's news center is located.
Everything you hear and see on TV is bro: Everything you hear and see on TV is broadcasted from that studio.
Sorry, but there's been a power outage a: Sorry, but there's been a power outage at this station.
You'll have to come back some other ti-: You'll have to come back some other ti-
Are you talking about Professor Jenner's: Are you talking about Professor Jenner's daughter?
Well, I've been guarding this post all d: Well, I've been guarding this post all day and I can say with certainty that Melia did not come this way.
Whoever told you Melia came this way mus: Whoever told you Melia came this way must've been mistaken.
Yeah, you look new around here.
West Gearen is for experienced trainers: West Gearen is for experienced trainers only. Get lost.
OFFICER: Due to a weird fog appearing ov: OFFICER: Due to a weird fog appearing over West Gearen, I cannot allow you to pass.
I'm trying to save money to get a nice a: I'm trying to save money to get a nice apartment in Grand Dream City.
If you look off the coast here you can s: If you look off the coast here you can see West Gearen City.
West Gearen City is actually a separate: West Gearen City is actually a separate city despite being called Gearen.
I think it's owned by the Blakeorys. The: I think it's owned by the Blakeorys. The heir to the Blakeory fortune, Saki Blakeory, is the Gym Leader there.
We're setting up a Help Center in Kakori: We're setting up a Help Center in Kakori Village so I had to make the trip here.
If you ever visit Terajuma you should se: If you ever visit Terajuma you should see if our Help Center is set up!
I tried battling off that Team Xen Grunt: I tried battling off that Team Xen Grunt, but they were too much for me.
I'm going to get stronger so that Team X: I'm going to get stronger so that Team Xen won't defeat me so easily again.
Jan and Zumi came from Grand Dream City.
It's a place that's better than Gearen i: It's a place that's better than Gearen in every and any way possible.
But I will say that ever since those two: But I will say that ever since those two arrived, this city has been in better shape.
Okay... This is what I've learned from m: Okay... This is what I've learned from my teacher!
Gym Leaders in the Aevium Region always: Gym Leaders in the Aevium Region always have 6 Pokémon!
Having a full roster before a Gym Leader: Having a full roster before a Gym Leader fight is recommended at all times!
Unlike other regions, Aevium has an Elit: Unlike other regions, Aevium has an Elite 8 rather than an Elite 4!
That's all I've learned, but I'll read u: That's all I've learned, but I'll read up more and figure more things out!
I wouldn't go down the stairs here.
I went down there and some jerk beat up: I went down there and some jerk beat up my precious Pokémon.
He was quite tough. Tougher than any new: He was quite tough. Tougher than any newbie around here.
Wait a minute... you don't even have a P: Wait a minute... you don't even have a Pokémon yet!
You can't go this way if you don't have: You can't go this way if you don't have a Pokémon!
What's a pretty face like you doing in a: What's a pretty face like you doing in a pretty place like this?
Hey, what's the big deal? You don't have: Hey, what's the big deal? You don't have a Pokémon?
Trainers that don't carry a roster of 6: Trainers that don't carry a roster of 6 Pokémon will surely fail their quest.
Will you be the one to make this stateme: Will you be the one to make this statement false?
What is Team Xen doing here?! I thought: What is Team Xen doing here?! I thought they were just a myth!
It looks like those thugs have moved on: It looks like those thugs have moved on from here.
They won't cause us anymore trouble.
Hey... You're kinda cute. You wanna come: Hey... You're kinda cute. You wanna come back to my place?
I remember when this train used to go al: I remember when this train used to go all the way to Akuwa Town!
It got shut down for some unknown reason: It got shut down for some unknown reason though...
Oh good! I was looking for a weak traine: Oh good! I was looking for a weak trainer!
I'll defeat you, take your money, and th: I'll defeat you, take your money, and then go shopping at the mall!
You're supposed to let me win, obviously: You're supposed to let me win, obviously!
My son is so insistent that we go visit: My son is so insistent that we go visit Route 1 and Goldenwood Forest.
He won't understand that it's far too da: He won't understand that it's far too dangerous to travel there.
So you want to know about the Hidden Lib: So you want to know about the Hidden Library?
Well, I used to be a history teacher so: Well, I used to be a history teacher so I may know a thing or two about the place.
First off, the library was created for t: First off, the library was created for the sole purpose of preserving knowledge held by an ancient civilization.
However, measures were taken to ensure t: However, measures were taken to ensure that only people of this ancient civilization could open the doors.
This means that even if we found the lib: This means that even if we found the library, it would be impossible to open.
That is, of course, assuming that we don: That is, of course, assuming that we don't have a descendant in our midst.
If I finish my homework for the week, mo: If I finish my homework for the week, mom said that we could go to Route 1!
I love going there because it's so much: I love going there because it's so much fun!
I wouldn't go this way... There's a ruff: I wouldn't go this way... There's a ruffian that asks for a toll to cross the bridge.
He's pretty tough, so he might send you: He's pretty tough, so he might send you home packin'!
There's a jerk on this bridge who won't: There's a jerk on this bridge who won't let you pass unless you pay...
When I become Champion I'm gonna bully t: When I become Champion I'm gonna bully that guy.
Wanna hear what I've learned from Profes: Wanna hear what I've learned from Professor Jenner?
Staryu evolves from a Water Stone! Poryg: Staryu evolves from a Water Stone! Porygon evolves from an Upgrade and a Link Heart!
Slowpoke evolves into Slowking with a Ki: Slowpoke evolves into Slowking with a King's Rock and a Link Heart!
I'm on break from work, so why don't we: I'm on break from work, so why don't we have a quick little battle?
I suppose my break is almost over.
I should start heading back soon.
This is where all the cool kids hang out: This is where all the cool kids hang out!
You can totally hang out here!: You can totally hang out here!
I went down to Junction Bridge to visit: I went down to Junction Bridge to visit the old factory there... I think I heard screaming? Crying? Laughter? I'm not sure...
I never would've imagined seeing a Team: I never would've imagined seeing a Team Xen Grunt here in the city.
What are we supposed to do?: What are we supposed to do?
Team Xen left the city, but now I have t: Team Xen left the city, but now I have to worry about the crazy laughter I can hear inside of the factory.
There's something called a \"Level Cap\": There's something called a "Level Cap" in this region that can be quite harsh on newcomers.
If you don't have the Badge for the next: If you don't have the Badge for the next cap, your Pokémon will no longer gain EXP.
But they say that you can bypass this ca: But they say that you can bypass this cap by using Rare Candies.
If a Pokémon is somehow past the cap, th: If a Pokémon is somehow past the cap, they won't listen to you at all.
If that ever happens to you... Use this!: If that ever happens to you... Use this!
The Reverse Candy is like the opposite o: The Reverse Candy is like the opposite of a Rare Candy.
Instead of leveling you up, it de-levels: Instead of leveling you up, it de-levels you!
If you ever find yourself past the \"Lev: If you ever find yourself past the "Level Cap", just give your Pokémon a Reverse Candy!
Are you new to the city? Same here!: Are you new to the city? Same here!
\\GTHUG: Sorry, but this bridge has a to: \GTHUG: Sorry, but this bridge has a toll. Pay it or turn back. $300.

THUG: Yeah, that's right. Run away.

My easy money making technique can't go: My easy money making technique can't go on if there are trainers like you walking around...
Fine, I'll leave, and I probably won't b: Fine, I'll leave, and I probably won't be back. But seriously? Screw you.
REN: If I remember correctly, Venam said: REN: If I remember correctly, Venam said she'd go home after your match with her.
We should make our way over there now, b: We should make our way over there now, but carefully. There are Xen Grunts all over the city.
???: I don't mean to eavesdrop, but I he: ???: I don't mean to eavesdrop, but I heard you mention Venam's name?
REN: Huh...? Aren't you Karrina? The gir: REN: Huh...? Aren't you Karrina? The girl who hangs out by the docks often?
KARRINA: I may be a gang leader, but tha: KARRINA: I may be a gang leader, but that doesn't mean we do bad things.
Quite the opposite, actually. We work to: Quite the opposite, actually. We work to make sure the streets of Gearen are as clean as possible.
Anyway, back on topic with Venam. Are yo: Anyway, back on topic with Venam. Are you two looking for her?
REN: That's right. Have you run into her: REN: That's right. Have you run into her?
KARRINA: When I saw that the city was be: KARRINA: When I saw that the city was being overrun with Team Xen, I contacted her immediately.
I got word that one of their Admins was: I got word that one of their Admins was holding themselves off in the Abandoned Factory on Junction Bridge.
Before I could even explain the situatio: Before I could even explain the situation, Venam dashed on over there.
REN: Junction Bridge... That's just west: REN: Junction Bridge... That's just west of the train station to Route 1.
Of course Venam would jump in head-first: Of course Venam would jump in head-first without thinking...
But if a Xen Admin is there, maybe we ca: But if a Xen Admin is there, maybe we can stop all of this before it gets too bad.
Alright, we'll head for Junction Bridge: Alright, we'll head for Junction Bridge and assist Venam.
KARRINA: Great, we could use more help. I'm going that way myself. You guys wanna walk there now?
KARRINA: Awesome. I'll lead the way.
REN: Do you have something to take care: REN: Do you have something to take care of? Alright, but don't take too long.
I'm going to go there right now with Kar: I'm going to go there right now with Karrina, though.
Remember, it's just west of the train st: Remember, it's just west of the train station to Route 1.
What's with the sad face? Did something: What's with the sad face? Did something happen?
Rosa? Oh, yeah... She accidentally bumpe: Rosa? Oh, yeah... She accidentally bumped into me while she was leaving this complex.
It looked like Rosa was in a hurry to ge: It looked like Rosa was in a hurry to get somewhere.
Where she went? Um, it looked like she w: Where she went? Um, it looked like she was heading for the pier.
I believe she was headed in the directio: I believe she was headed in the direction of Oceana Pier.
But you didn't hear that from me.
Have you seen a blonde girl named Melia?: Have you seen a blonde girl named Melia? We need her!
Just stay out of Team Xen's way!: Just stay out of Team Xen's way!
Weren't you that kid at the forest? You': Weren't you that kid at the forest? You've caused us so much grief!
I know you're hiding her somewhere in th: I know you're hiding her somewhere in the park!
Tell us where she is! We need her!: Tell us where she is! We need her!
Hey kid, do you remember me? I was that: Hey kid, do you remember me? I was that fisherman at Goldenwood Forest!
I was able to escape in time, but not ev: I was able to escape in time, but not everyone got so lucky.
By the way, where's that girl that was w: By the way, where's that girl that was with you?
Hopefully she made it out okay...
We often get newcomers here in East Gear: We often get newcomers here in East Gearen City.
As a result, the people down at Gearen L: As a result, the people down at Gearen Lab have constructed a school for them.
The S.S. Oceana was supposed to take me: The S.S. Oceana was supposed to take me back to Unova, but...
I guess I'm stuck here for now.
When Gearen City was first constructed t: When Gearen City was first constructed there was a major fire.
It tore through everything, and it felt: It tore through everything, and it felt like all hope was lost, but...
Somehow we all made it through. Now Gear: Somehow we all made it through. Now Gearen City is doing well enough.
Team Xen has infiltrated the city...? Sa: Team Xen has infiltrated the city...? Say it isn't so...
I remember this city before the Great Fi: I remember this city before the Great Fire brought it all down.
Everything was perfect. The economy was: Everything was perfect. The economy was booming, and now...?
Well, I suppose it's better than it used: Well, I suppose it's better than it used to be...
